basic.question_text: 查询每部电影的**标题、国内票房和国际票房**。
basic.question_context: 使用 INNER JOIN 连接 movies 和 boxoffice 表。关联字段：movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, domestic_sales, international_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
accept_alternatives: SELECT title, domestic_sales, international_sales FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
hints: INNER JOIN 表名 ON 条件
SELECT title, domestic_sales, international_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
SELECT title, domestic_sales, international_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;

basic.question_text: 查询**国际票房大于国内票房的**电影标题和两个票房数据。
basic.question_context: 在 JOIN 基础上加 WHERE 条件。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, domestic_sales, international_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE international_sales > domestic_sales;
hints: JOIN 后面可以加 WHERE：WHERE international_sales > domestic_sales
SELECT title, domestic_sales, international_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE international_sales > domestic_sales;
SELECT title, domestic_sales, international_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE international_sales > domestic_sales;

basic.question_text: 查询所有电影按**评分降序**排列，返回电影标题和评分。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY rating DESC;
hints: ORDER BY rating DESC 从高评分到低评分
SELECT title, rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY rating DESC;
SELECT title, rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY rating DESC;

basic.question_text: 查询电影**片长超过 100 分钟**的电影标题、片长和评分。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes, rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE length_minutes > 100;
hints: WHERE length_minutes > 100 筛选片长超过100分钟的
SELECT title, length_minutes, rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE length_minutes > 100;
SELECT title, length_minutes, rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE length_minutes > 100;

basic.question_text: 查询**评分大于 8.0** 的电影标题、导演和评分。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, director, rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE rating > 8.0;
hints: WHERE rating > 8.0 筛选高评分电影
SELECT title, director, rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE rating > 8.0;
SELECT title, director, rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE rating > 8.0;

intermediate.question_text: 查询每位导演电影的**平均评分**，按平均评分降序排列。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT director, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;
accept_alternatives: SELECT director, AVG(rating) FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY AVG(rating) DESC;
hints: GROUP BY director, 然后 AVG(rating) 计算每位导演的平均评分
SELECT director, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;
SELECT director, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**总票房（国内+国际）超过 5 亿**的电影标题和总票房。
intermediate.question_context: JOIN + WHERE 中计算 domestic_sales + international_sales。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales AS total_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE domestic_sales + international_sales > 500000000;
hints: WHERE domestic_sales + international_sales > 500000000
SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales AS total_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE domestic_sales + international_sales > 500000000;
SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales AS total_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE domestic_sales + international_sales > 500000000;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**国内票房最低的 3 部**电影标题和票房。
intermediate.question_context: JOIN + ORDER BY domestic_sales ASC + LIMIT 3。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, domestic_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY domestic_sales ASC LIMIT 3;
hints: ORDER BY domestic_sales ASC LIMIT 3
SELECT title, domestic_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY domestic_sales ASC LIMIT 3;
SELECT title, domestic_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY domestic_sales ASC LIMIT 3;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**国际票房占总票房比例最高**的电影标题和比例。
intermediate.question_context: 计算 international_sales / (domestic_sales + international_sales)，用 ORDER BY 和 LIMIT 1。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, CAST(international_sales AS REAL) / (domestic_sales + international_sales) AS intl_ratio FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY intl_ratio DESC LIMIT 1;
hints: international_sales * 1.0 / (domestic_sales + international_sales)

SELECT title, CAST(international_sales AS REAL) / (domestic_sales + international_sales) AS intl_ratio FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY intl_ratio DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT title, international_sales * 1.0 / (domestic_sales + international_sales) AS intl_ratio FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY intl_ratio DESC LIMIT 1;

intermediate.question_text: 列出每部电影的标题，以及它在所有电影中的票房排名（按总票房降序）。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales AS total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY domestic_sales + international_sales DESC) AS sales_rank FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;
hints: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total DESC)

SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales AS total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY domestic_sales + international_sales DESC) AS rank FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;

SELECT title, domestic_sales + international_sales AS total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY domestic_sales + international_sales DESC) AS rank FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id;

challenge.question_text: 查询**国内票房超过平均国内票房**的电影标题和票房。
challenge.question_context: 用子查询计算平均票房。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT title, domestic_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE domestic_sales > (SELECT AVG(domestic_sales) FROM boxoffice);
hints: 子查询：(SELECT AVG(domestic_sales) FROM boxoffice)
SELECT title, domestic_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE domestic_sales > (SELECT AVG(domestic_sales) FROM boxoffice);
SELECT title, domestic_sales FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE domestic_sales > (SELECT AVG(domestic_sales) FROM boxoffice);

challenge.question_text: 查询**票房总和排名前 3 的导演**及总票房。
challenge.question_context: JOIN + GROUP BY director + SUM + ORDER BY + LIMIT。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales + international_sales) AS total FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3;
hints: GROUP BY director, SUM(domestic_sales + international_sales), ORDER BY ... DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales + international_sales) AS total FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT director, SUM(domestic_sales + international_sales) AS total FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id GROUP BY director ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 3;

challenge.question_text: 做一份报告：列出每部电影的标题、片长、评分和票房收入比（每百万美元票房对应的片长分钟数）。按比值升序。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes, rating, CAST(length_minutes AS REAL) / ((domestic_sales + international_sales) / 1000000.0) AS min_per_million FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY min_per_million;
hints: length_minutes * 1.0 / ((domestic_sales + international_sales) / 1000000.0)
SELECT title, length_minutes * 1.0 / ((domestic_sales + international_sales) / 1000000.0) AS ratio FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY ratio;
SELECT title, length_minutes * 1.0 / ((domestic_sales + international_sales) / 1000000.0) AS ratio FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id ORDER BY ratio;
